message:
feat(runtime): implement cancel reason cause chains

Update cancel_request() to build proper cause chains when propagating
cancellation through the region tree:

- Sort regions by depth to ensure parents are processed before children
- Build HashMap of region -> CancelReason for cause chain construction
- Each child region's ParentCancelled reason chains to its parent's reason
- Chain depth matches region nesting depth
- Root cause is always the original trigger

Example: If root cancels with Deadline, grandchild's chain is:
  ParentCancelled(child) -> ParentCancelled(root) -> Deadline

Added comprehensive test verifying:
- Chain depth matches nesting (1, 2, 3 for root/child/grandchild)
- Root cause is preserved through the chain
- Origin region tracks immediate parent
- Full chain traversal works correctly

Closes: asupersync-on45

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
